headline: Will BlackRock’s (BLK) New Nasdaq 100 ETF and Tokenization Push Redefine Its Core Narrative?
summary: Earlier this month, BlackRock outlined plans to launch the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF (ticker: IQQ) on Nasdaq with an initial US$24 net asset value per share and a gross expense ratio of 0.12%, temporarily reduced to 0.10% through July 31, 2027, expanding its established US$41.00 billions global Nasdaq-100 toolkit. By pairing this ETF launch with rapid expansion of its blockchain-based BUIDL fund and participation in government-backed tokenization initiatives, BlackRock is deepening its role at...

headline: Stock Futures Jump. Market Rally Gathers Pace as Earnings Season Ramps Up.
summary: Stocks looked set to rise again on Wednesday, building on gains from the previous session that were powered by a solid start to the second-quarter earnings season and cooler-than-expected inflation data.  Nasdaq 100 futures added 0.4%.  Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rose 81 points, or 0.2%.

headline: Stocks drift higher on Wall Street as oil prices swing
summary: U.S. stocks are drifting higher Wednesday following strong profit reports from BlackRock and other big companies.  The gains came as oil prices swung near their highest levels in a month because of the war with Iran.  BlackRock helped lead the market with a rise of 7.7% after the company behind some of the most popular investment funds reported stronger profit and revenue for the latest quarter than analysts expected.

content.title: Stocks drift higher on Wall Street as oil prices swing

The gains came as oil prices swung near their highest levels in a month because of the war with Iran.  BlackRock helped lead the market with a rise of 7.7% after the company behind some of the most popular investment funds reported stronger profit and revenue for the latest quarter than analysts expected.
